pi_items.source: Verified 5 T-floor systems exist: T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35
All 5 systems found in 4StoreyBuilding.inp via grep search at lines 3012, 3053, 3094, 3135, 3176
Verified in 4StoreyBuilding.inp: T.S31 (line 3020), T.E32 (line 3061), T.N33 (line 3102), T.W34 (line 3143), T.C35 (line 3184)
Verified in 4StoreyBuilding.inp: T.S31 (line 3021), T.E32 (line 3062), T.N33 (line 3103), T.W34 (line 3144), T.C35 (line 3185)
Verified in 4StoreyBuilding.inp: T.S31 (line 3024), T.E32 (line 3065), T.N33 (line 3106), T.W34 (line 3147), T.C35 (line 3188)

Value exists but metadata claim of 'equivalent to EER 3.5 at ARI conditions' is contradicted. Per eQUEST conversion formula COOLING-EIR = (1/EER - 0.012167) / ((1/3.413) + 0.012167), COOLING-EIR=0.28571 actually corresponds to EER≈10.065. The value 0.28571 = 1/3.5 using simplified formula without ARI fan adjustment. See https://energy-models.com/tools/eir-equest-how-convert-eer-cop-and-hspf

pi_items.verified_value: EER ≈10.065 at ARI conditions (per standard eQUEST conversion formula)
pi_items.source: eQUEST conversion formula: COOLING-EIR = (1/EER - 0.012167) / ((1/3.413) + 0.012167). With 0.28571 as input: 1/EER ≈ 0.09936, EER ≈ 10.065. See https://energy-models.com/tools/eir-equest-how-convert-eer-cop-and-hspf
Mathematically correct: 1/0.90 (90% AFUE) = 1.11111... This is the standard conversion where HIR = 1/AFUE
HIR = 1/AFUE conversion: 1.11111 ≈ 1/0.90 = 1.11111. Standard furnace efficiency relationship.

Value specified but not independently verified against public documentation. Described as 'premium efficiency fan motors with VFD-equivalent performance' - reasonable claim for high-efficiency retrofit
Task description and verifier.py confirm full annual DOE-2.2 simulation required after equipment changes

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding BDL model exists with 5 top-floor PSZ systems (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35). Original baseline parameters are verified: COOLING-EIR=0.34565, FURNACE-HIR=1.24069, SUPPLY-EFF=0.53. Target FURNACE-HIR of 1.11111 correctly represents 90% AFUE. CRITICAL ERROR: Target COOLING-EIR of 0.28571 is claimed to equal 'EER 3.5 at ARI conditions', but using the standard eQUEST conversion formula, 0.28571 actually corresponds to EER≈10.06. The value appears to come from a simplified 1/EER calculation (1/3.5=0.28571) without the proper ARI fan adjustment factors. Target SUPPLY-EFF of 0.65 is not independently verified against authoritative sources.
